reviews.comment:
Buena atención en la playa y excelente la atención  del shop a pesar de la.hora antes del.cierre ..como socio del ACA hace mas de 25 años se diferencia la aten cion forzada y la de buena onda

(Translated by Google)
Good service on the beach and excellent service in the shop despite the hour before closing time. As an ACA member for over 25 years, I can tell the difference between forced service and friendly service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaN1pxMWpRRRAB
